title: Aceratium ganitrum
taxonomy: Aceratium ganitrum is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to the Himalayan region, and its classification is as follows: it is placed within the genus Aceratium, which is a part of the family Celastraceae. The family Celastraceae is a group of flowering plants that are often referred to as the bittersweet or staff tree family. This family is further classified within the order Celastrales, which is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as the angiosperms. The classification of Aceratium ganitrum reflects its evolutionary relationships and its position within the broader plant kingdom.
